cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure this out. So there are five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each of them starts with a partner. The question is about tracking who ends up with whom after several partner switches. First, let me list the initial partners: - Alice is with Jamie. - Bob is with Patrick. - Claire is with Ophelia. - Dave is with Melissa. - Eve is with Rodrigo. Then, there are a series of partner switches. The problem is asking who Alice ends up with at the end. Let's go through each step carefully. First switch: Dave and Bob switch partners. So initially, Dave is with Melissa, and Bob is with Patrick. After switching, Dave will be with Patrick, and Bob will be with Melissa. Second switch: Claire and Dave switch partners. Before this switch, Claire is with Ophelia and Dave is with Patrick. After switching, Claire will be with Patrick, and Dave will be with Ophelia. Third switch: Eve and Alice switch partners. Initially, Eve is with Rodrigo and Alice is with Jamie. After switching, Eve will be with Jamie, and Alice will be with Rodrigo. Fourth switch: Claire and Eve switch partners.
